Premium Features

AI Chatbot Access

Enhanced AI chatbot with priority responses and custom training

Enhanced Security

Advanced anti-raid protection and member verification systems

Dashboard Upgrades

Real-time analytics, member activity feed, and advanced statistics

Custom Bot Appearance

Customize bot username, avatar, and colors per server

White-Label Support

White-label branding for your server with custom theme

Advanced Analytics

CSV/PDF exports, detailed member analytics, and trend analysis

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I cancel anytime?

Yes! Cancel your PayPal subscription at any time with no penalties.

Does premium work on multiple servers?

Yes! One payment covers unlimited servers with the same bot.

Is there a free trial?

Contact the bot owner for trial access to premium features.

How do I activate premium?

After payment, use the /premium "guildid" command to activate.
